subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast dawned from the horizon of fidelity! My Branch hath presented himself and recited that which I sent forth. Verily, We perceived from it a fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المشرق من افق الوفا قد حضر غصنی و قرا ما ارسلته انا وجدنا منه عرف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
